reviews.review_description: Wish I had this opportunity when I was younger especially during intense Canadian winters. Blasting stuff, stomping around in a safe environment. What more could one ask for?
I really like this game, it's a very fun party and casual game to play. All it really needs now is players! This review will help the game to be more visible on the page, keep up the good work!

The mechanic's are amazing I love the guns the bumper cars are amazing but it was kinda boring just because there was no one on I'm going to tell my friends to download this it's super fun I recommend to download
Had initially found major issue with the cost of microtransactions, developer listened and has fixed the concerns, 👍 it's gorilla tag with sports.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! I'm just trying to make a fun game that I can be proud of :)

reviews.review_title: why do i have to crawl everywhere?
reviews.review_description: i have tried everything to be able to walk around instead im half stuck in the floor, i reset boundary multiple times and its fine with everything else. i will give it higher stars when i can use it properly

developer_response.body: I've significantly improved the locomotion since this version, please try it again and see how you like it!

reviews.review_description: The Developer Put so much afford what i could See . What i really Like is that so much things happend in the Screen and the best is that the Game works without any FPS Drops or lag. But there some Bugs , but i am Sure that this going to be Patches very soon. You should give this Game a try
The games in it are well made, the developer is really cool, it looks amazing and deserves more players.
Really enjoyed this and had a good laugh with some friends blowing each other up and messing around in the lobby. Hope to see more players in the game soon, I really think this has potential!

words can describe how fun this game is, the owner is so nice he gave me and my friends promo codes. Although the game has a few bugs, it’s only brand new and i must say the game looks incredible even if it’s just a week old! So i suggest that you should get this game
